headline: Danaher Announces Quarterly Dividend
summary: Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) announced today that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share of its common stock, payable on July 31, 2026 to holders of record on June 26, 2026.

headline: Trade Tracker: Bill Baruch sells Thermo Fisher, trims Amgen and buys Eli Lilly
summary: Bill Baruch, Blue Line Capital founder and president, joins CNBC’s 'Halftime Report' to detail his latest portfolio moves.
